# LLMs.txt - AI Model Access Configuration
# This file provides information about accessing DoTheThing's content and APIs for AI models

Model: *
Allow: /
Allow: /blog
Allow: /blog/*
Allow: /about
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms
Allow: /contact
Allow: /blog-posts.json
Allow: /sitemap.xml
Allow: /robots.txt

# Disallow access to admin and internal pages
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api/admin
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /.well-known/admin

# Content Guidelines
# - Respect the robots.txt file for crawling
# - Do not use content for training without permission
# - Attribution to DoTheThing is required when using content
# - Do not create competing products based on DoTheThing content

# Contact for permissions
Contact: contact@dothething.tech

# Organization Information
Organization: DoTheThing
Website: https://dothething.tech
Description: AI-powered task breakdown tool designed for ADHD brains

# Content Categories
Categories:
  - ADHD Task Management
  - Productivity Tools
  - Executive Dysfunction Support
  - Neurodiversity
  - Time Management
  - Task Breakdown Strategies

# API Endpoints (Public)
APIs:
  - GET /blog-posts.json - Retrieve all blog posts metadata
  - GET /sitemap.xml - Retrieve XML sitemap

# Schema Information
Schemas:
  - Organization: https://dothething.tech/#organization
  - WebSite: https://dothething.tech/#website
  - BlogPosting: https://dothething.tech/blog/* (individual posts)
  - FAQPage: https://dothething.tech/blog/* (posts with FAQ sections)

# Language Support
Languages:
  - en-US (English - United States)

# Last Updated
Updated: 2026-05-06
